# Enumeration: ResourceType

Supported resource types that plugins can depend on. Each type has its own set of valid permissions.

## Enumeration Members[​](#enumeration-members "Direct link to Enumeration Members")

### APP[​](#app "Direct link to APP")

```ts
APP: "app";

```

Databricks App dependency

***

### DATABASE[​](#database "Direct link to DATABASE")

```ts
DATABASE: "database";

```

Database (Lakebase) for persistent storage

***

### EXPERIMENT[​](#experiment "Direct link to EXPERIMENT")

```ts
EXPERIMENT: "experiment";

```

MLflow Experiment for ML tracking

***

### GENIE\_SPACE[​](#genie_space "Direct link to GENIE_SPACE")

```ts
GENIE_SPACE: "genie_space";

```

Genie Space for AI assistant

***

### JOB[​](#job "Direct link to JOB")

```ts
JOB: "job";

```

Databricks Job for scheduled or triggered workflows

***

### SECRET[​](#secret "Direct link to SECRET")

```ts
SECRET: "secret";

```

Secret scope for secure credential storage

***

### SERVING\_ENDPOINT[​](#serving_endpoint "Direct link to SERVING_ENDPOINT")

```ts
SERVING_ENDPOINT: "serving_endpoint";

```

Model serving endpoint for ML inference

***

### SQL\_WAREHOUSE[​](#sql_warehouse "Direct link to SQL_WAREHOUSE")

```ts
SQL_WAREHOUSE: "sql_warehouse";

```

Databricks SQL Warehouse for query execution

***

### UC\_CONNECTION[​](#uc_connection "Direct link to UC_CONNECTION")

```ts
UC_CONNECTION: "uc_connection";

```

Unity Catalog Connection for external data sources

***

### UC\_FUNCTION[​](#uc_function "Direct link to UC_FUNCTION")

```ts
UC_FUNCTION: "uc_function";

```

Unity Catalog Function

***

### VECTOR\_SEARCH\_INDEX[​](#vector_search_index "Direct link to VECTOR_SEARCH_INDEX")

```ts
VECTOR_SEARCH_INDEX: "vector_search_index";

```

Vector Search Index for similarity search

***

### VOLUME[​](#volume "Direct link to VOLUME")

```ts
VOLUME: "volume";

```

Unity Catalog Volume for file storage
